item.title: IMTS Announces 2026 Conferences Lineup
item.description: The upcoming IMTS 2026 conference lineup reveals key commercial themes in manufacturing technology and quality control systems.

item.title: SCANOLOGY Introduces AccuArm Portable Coordinate Measuring Machine
item.description: SCANOLOGY announces the AccuArm, a new portable CMM targeting commercial industrial metrology applications.

item.title: ADLINK eyes doube-digit growth - Taipei Times
item.description: ADLINK forecasts double-digit growth driven by strong demand for automated optical inspection and edge computing solutions in the machine vision market.

item.title: TemperChip Brings Intelligent Temperature Control to CNC Machining
item.description: TemperChip introduces intelligent temperature control hardware for CNC machining, addressing critical variables in dimensional accuracy.

item.title: AUTOMATE 2026 to Spotlight AI, Robotics and the Future of Industrial Automation
item.description: The upcoming AUTOMATE 2026 exhibition will showcase new commercial AI and robotics solutions for industrial automation.

item.title: Automation Fuels Strong Start to 2026 Manufacturing Technology Orders
item.description: Strong growth in manufacturing technology orders highlights increasing commercial adoption of factory automation systems.

item.title: Allied Vision FPGA IP Core Implementing GigE Vision 3.0
item.description: Allied Vision releases an FPGA IP core for GigE Vision 3.0, enabling high-speed commercial machine vision applications.
